creator: leeym@cae.ce.ntu.edu.tw
text:
On Sun, Aug 12, 2001 at 12:21:48PM -0500, David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
> Registering depends: p5-XML-Stream-1.12 p5-Digest-SHA1-2.00 
> p5-Time-101.062101 p5-Unicode-String-2.06 p5-XML-Parser-2.30 expat-1.95.1_1.
> Creating gzip'd tar ball in 
> '/usr/home/poseiden/port/p5-Net-Jabber/p5-Net-Jabber-1.0022.tgz'
> tar: can't add file lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/Net/Jabber.pm : No such 
> file or directory
> tar: can't add file 
[deleted]
> lib/perl5/site_perl/5.6.0/mach/auto/Net/Jabber/.packlist : No such file 
> or directory
> pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
> *** Error code 1

Sorry, I forgot to make it compatible with between different version of perl.
Please replace all "5.6.0" by "%%PERL_VER%%" in pkg-plist.
